title: Rebate certificates unlawful if issued to control business
doc_html:
§304.  Rebate certificates unlawful if issued to control business

No person shall issue certificates to be known as rebate certificates or any evidence of indebtedness, if the contract upon which the certificates are based, is to control the business of the party thereto.
doc_text:
§304.  Rebate certificates unlawful if issued to control business
No person shall issue certificates to be known as rebate certificates or any evidence of indebtedness, if the contract upon which the certificates are based, is to control the business of the party thereto.
